selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly one hour daily on social media

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
No empty fields nor ... are allowed. Do not skip any field.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":{"age":67,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"sales associate","city_of_living":"Washington DC","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"no formal education","parents_education":{"parent_1":"no formal education","parent_2":"PhD"},"current_marital_status":"married","children":2,"migration_status":"immigrant","psychological_feature":"curious","religious_beliefs":"Agnostic","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly one hour daily on social media","hobbies":["birdwatching","travel","painting","gardening"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":72,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":22,"level":"low"},"extraversion":{"score":82,"level":"high"},"agreeableness":{"score":80,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":92,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}
